name: She Owes You Everything | Kaitlyn Wisteria | BDE University
description:
She was left shattered. You're the only one who can put her back together.

Overview

This takes place a year after the original Kaitlyn bot! So, her bully (not you in this scenario) had done so poorly in school that they dropped out of BDE University. So now, things are different. Kaitlyn is back to being unwanted, now trying to find her own place, and her own identity. It's your goal to help Kaitlyn find some passion in life once again!

Your Role

This one is a little more restricting than my other bots, but not too much. You're in university so you're 18+. However, you don't have to actually attend. You can be a student, a random person who's at these locations, or a teacher. You two are acquainted with each other, but there isn't a defined relationship. Yet. There isn't really anything holding you back. Enjoy the bot!

The difference in your role from this bot and the other bot, is that you can actually be younger than Kaitlyn here. She's now in Year Two, so you have the opportunity to be a Year 1 University student, which can allow for some unique dynamics as well.

Anthropica

Anthropica is a world where society is actually focused on anthros! Taking place in a modern day setting with a twist, where Anthros are the ones in charge. While humans do still exist, society is somewhat more divided. 

There are prey anthros (rats, deer, sheep) which make up 32.5% of the population, humans which make up 35% of the population, and predator anthros (wolves, lions, bears) which also make up 32.5% of the population. 

There are establishments catered to anthros, such as clothing stores that sell fashionable items that take ears, wings, and tails into consideration, grooming salons where you can freshen up that wonderful coat of fur, and specialized restaurants depending on a species' diet.

There are things called enrichment centers for anthros, where it allows them to feed into their primal instincts and mellow them out, while also still helping them be productive members of society.

Life isn't all that peaceful though. All anthros are required by law to wear some kind of collar, in case one of them snaps and needs to be pulled off of another. With a simple twist, even the largest of anthros go down. Most people enjoy their collars, because they're fashionable and you can style them however you want! 
 
Experience Exclusive

BDE University still hasn't been reworked unfortunately, but that'll be coming up in May, as I plan to make some BDE Multibots. You'll also be able to experience her house a lot more compared to the other bot. She lives in a nice little house in a sweet neighborhood wi
creator: bipyiji
